sources.notes: Canonical names, alias decisions, stable identifiers, and prototype placeholder assets are project curation.

sources.notes: Numeric values are used only for reviewed exact food-form mappings; values are per 100 g.

sources.provider: USDA Food Safety and Inspection Service

storageProfiles.instructions: 带壳鸡蛋冷藏保存；避免与生肉、水产直接接触。
storageProfiles.evidenceKey: 鸡蛋冷藏40-60天；温度不超过15℃约30天
